input_args.parameters_json_dump: '{"abstract": "Abstract The balsam twig aphid Mindarus abietinus Koch (Hemiptera: Aphididae) is a major pest of economic importance for the Christmas tree industry. Global warming during the 21st century could potentially increase local population densities and reinforce the pest status of this aphid in commercial fir (Abies Miller; Pinaceae) plantations in Qu\\u00c3\\u00a9bec, Canada. During this study, we tested the effects of a warmer environment on colony growth rates of M. abietinus and aphid morph composition during the second generation of its cycle, which is key to colony size growth and potential damage to Christmas trees. We monitored M. abietinus populations on two host fir species and one host fir variety, in order to understand the early season dynamics of this aphid and its host tree. It was possible to distinguish the two overlapping generations of winged aphids leaving colonies, which led to observing a much higher proportion of wingless daughters, produced by the stem mother, than what had previously been reported. Colony growth rates were significantly higher in a warmer environment than in the nearby plantation, suggesting that warmer temperatures in late spring and early summer may provide the suitable conditions required for M. abietinus colonies of greater density. R\\u00c3\\u00a9sum\\u00c3\\u00a9 Le puceron des pousses du sapin Mindarus abietinus Koch (Hemiptera : Aphididae) est un ravageur d\\u00e2\\u20ac\\u2122importance \\u00c3\\u00a9conomique en plantations commerciales d\\u00e2\\u20ac\\u2122arbres de No\\u00c3\\u00abl. Au 21e si\\u00c3\\u00a8cle, le r\\u00c3\\u00a9chauffement climatique pourrait augmenter ses densit\\u00c3\\u00a9s locales en plantation de sapin (Abies Miller ; Pinaceae) et renforcer son statut d\\u00e2\\u20ac\\u2122insecte ravageur au Qu\\u00c3\\u00a9bec, Canada. Nous avons test\\u00c3\\u00a9 exp\\u00c3\\u00a9rimentalement les effets d\\u00e2\\u20ac\\u2122un environnement r\\u00c3\\u00a9chauff\\u00c3\\u00a9 sur la croissance des colonies de M. abietinus et le dimorphisme de prog\\u00c3\\u00a9nitures de la fondatrice \\u00c3\\u00a0 la deuxi\\u00c3\\u00a8me g\\u00c3\\u00a9n\\u00c3\\u00a9ration. Nous avons suivi les populations de M. abietinus sur trois arbres-h\\u00c3\\u00b4tes du genre Abies, afin de mieux comprendre leurs interactions. Nous avons pu s\\u00c3\\u00a9parer les deux g\\u00c3\\u00a9n\\u00c3\\u00a9rations chevauchantes de pucerons ail\\u00c3\\u00a9s quittant les colonies, ce qui nous a permis d\\u00e2\\u20ac\\u2122observer une plus grande proportion de prog\\u00c3\\u00a9nitures apt\\u00c3\\u00a8res de la fondatrice que dans les \\u00c3\\u00a9tudes ant\\u00c3\\u00a9rieures. Le taux de croissance des colonies \\u00c3\\u00a9tait plus \\u00c3\\u00a9lev\\u00c3\\u00a9 dans un environnement exp\\u00c3\\u00a9rimental r\\u00c3\\u00a9chauff\\u00c3\\u00a9 que dans la plantation environnante, sugg\\u00c3\\u00a9rant des conditions propices \\u00c3\\u00a0 des densit\\u00c3\\u00a9s plus \\u00c3\\u00a9lev\\u00c3\\u00a9es de M. abietinus.", "max_output_tokens": 4096, "model": "gpt-5-mini", "reasoning": {"effort": "low"}, "system_message": "You are EcodataGPT, a structured data extraction engine.\\n\\nGoal: extract fields from the user\'s abstract into the provided schema.\\n\\nRules:\\n- Only use information explicitly supported by the text. Do NOT guess or infer.\\n- If a field is not clearly stated, set it to null (or an empty list) as allowed by the schema.\\n- Prefer conservative outputs over over-extraction.\\n- Output must conform exactly to the schema (types, enums, lists).\\n\\n## Modulator Boolean Fields\\n\\nSet each to true only when the text provides explicit evidence; otherwise set to null.\\n\\n- **time_series**: true if the dataset contains repeated measurements at the same locations/populations over time (e.g. \\"annual surveys from 2005 to 2015\\", \\"monitored monthly\\"). A single snapshot is NOT a time series.\\n- **multispecies**: true if the dataset covers more than one species or taxonomic group.\\n- **threatened_species**: true if any studied species are described as threatened, endangered, vulnerable, at-risk, or listed under IUCN/CITES/national red lists.\\n- **new_species_science**: true if the study describes or names a species new to science (newly described taxon).\\n- **new_species_region**: true if the study reports a species recorded in a region for the first time (range extension, first regional record).\\n- **bias_north_south**: true if the text explicitly discusses geographic bias toward the Global North or underrepresentation of the Global South.", "temperature": null, "text_format": "{\\"$defs\\": {\\"DataSource\\":
